free_text: integrals of 138Ba and 141Pr using Am-Be neutron
BaCl2 Powder and Pr6O11 Powder of 12 mm diameter. The
weight of the BaCl2 and Pr6O11 were 1000+-2 mg and
55+-0.1 mg respectively. Foils of Mn(Mn(83%)-Cu) and
Au having 12 mm diameter with purity 99.9% were used
The neutron flux was 4 x 10E+07 neutrons per
second in 4pi direction. The neutron spectrum
epithermal component (7000 n/cm2/s) and fast component.
